title: artplants.de Silk Hydrangea, cream, 20"/50cm, Ø 7"/18cm - Simulation hydrangea/Artificial flower
features: with cream-white textile flowers, creating a real-touch surface for additional effect; diameter of flower ball approx. 7"/18 cm
with 4 high-quality leaves in full colour: dark green made of high-quality textile fibre
flexible strong stem to ensure an individual adaptation to your needs
ideal as an individual decoration in a vase or as a lovely complement for arrangements
description: Brief description from artplants.de: The Hydrangea flower from the new spring collection 2014 measures approx. 20"/50 cm in length. Individually as well as in a bunch, the decorative flower is beautiful to look at with its large flowers and in combination with the new cream-coloured bloom. Product description from artplants.de: Hydrangea from the new spring collection 2014 - overall length approx. 20"/50 cm - with cream-white textile flowers, creating a real-touch surface for additional effect; diameter of flower ball approx. 7"/18 cm - with 4 high-quality leaves in full colour: dark green made of high-quality textile fibre - flexible strong stem to ensure an individual adaptation to your needs - ideal as an individual decoration in a vase or as a lovely complement for arrangements Important informations from artplants.de: For questions about our products, tips for decorating, care and much more, we are at your disposal by phone and email. For other contact information, please click on our seller name. Delivery without decoration and pot (Unless otherwise mentioned). Please note that some artificial plants in certain rooms require a fire protection treatment. Products meet B3 according DIN4102-1 – Please take into consideration relevant safety standards. For a long-lasting color fidelity in the indoor and outdoor use, it is recommended an optional treatment with artplants UV-protection spray at regular intervals. The need for the repetition depends on the location and the environmental conditions.
